summary: Email Notification Feature for Hot Leads (Score 70+) - All backend tests passed (34/34), frontend fully functional. New email methods (send_hot_lead_alert, send_lead_acknowledgement) verified in code. Sales Intelligence dashboard and APIs continue working correctly.

tests: EmailService.send_hot_lead_alert method exists with correct parameters (lead_name, lead_email, lead_phone, lead_score, lead_source, score_breakdown, assigned_to)
EmailService.send_lead_acknowledgement method exists with cc_email parameter for CC to sales
send_email method supports optional from_email and cc_email parameters
new_email_service_methods.details: All new email methods implemented correctly with LEXA branded HTML templates

tests: _send_hot_lead_emails async background task exists in sales_intelligence.py
Task is called via asyncio.create_task when lead score >= 70
Task calls send_lead_acknowledgement (customer: webadmin@ → customer, CC sales@)
hot_lead_email_trigger.details: Email trigger only fires for first-time hot leads (score 70+) during pipeline aggregation

email_sent_flag.details: sales_pipeline collection updates email_sent flag to True after emails sent

tests: SENDER_EMAIL and SALES_EMAIL loaded from environment
Hot lead alert: from 'LEXA Web Admin', to SALES_EMAIL
Hot lead alert uses LEXA branded HTML with score breakdown and dashboard link
Lead acknowledgement uses LEXA branded HTML with thank you message and next steps
GET /api/sales-intelligence/dashboard-stats returns correct data (113 total leads, 49 hot leads)
GET /api/sales-intelligence/pipeline returns leads with lead_score, assigned_to populated
PUT /api/sales-intelligence/lead/{id}/status still works for updating stage
All authentication requirements still enforced (401/403 without token)

elements_verified: Sales Intelligence nav item appears in admin sidebar (position 2)
4 KPI cards (Total Leads: 113, Avg Score: 51.5, Pipeline Value: AED 17.4M, New This Week: 6)
Pipeline Stages funnel (New 98%, Contacted 1%, Qualified 1%, etc.)
Lead detail modal with 6 stage buttons

critical_code_review_comments: Email notification system uses Gmail SMTP (smtp.gmail.com:587) with credentials from .env
Hot lead emails fire as asyncio background tasks - won't block API responses
Email templates are LEXA branded HTML with proper styling
send_email now supports optional from_email and cc_email parameters for flexible routing
Internal alert shows full score breakdown with dashboard link
Customer acknowledgement includes 'what happens next' section
NOTE: Actual email delivery depends on SMTP credentials being valid - tests verify code structure only

success_rate.backend: 100% (34/34 tests passed: 14 email feature + 20 sales intelligence)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified, Sales Intelligence nav present)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 113 leads from 10 source collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email notification feature for hot leads verified. Methods exist: send_hot_lead_alert (internal), send_lead_acknowledgement (customer CC sales). Trigger in _send_hot_lead_emails fires for score >= 70. All Sales Intelligence APIs working. Admin: admin/lexa2026.

internal_alert.content: Score breakdown, lead details, dashboard link

customer_acknowledgement.content: Thank you, next steps, contact info
